step2.customerArchetype: Homeowners and small commercial property owners who have been burned by handymen and want a licensed pro on the next job
step2.painPoints: Past contractor cut corners; not sure what was done to code and what was patched
step2.desiredOutcomes: Work they'll never need to touch again, and a written record they can hand to an inspector

step3.customVoiceNotes: No upsell language; quote in plain numbers

step4.missionStatement: Do electrical work that lasts and tell you exactly what it will cost before we start.

step5.originSummary: Trained under a journeyman who taught me to do every job like an inspector was watching.
step5.motivation: Saw too many DIY jobs and shortcuts that turned into fires and re-wires.

step7.differentiation: Licensed and insured, on-site within 48 hours for service calls, written estimate before any work.
